generated_exposure.exposure_text: As we get older, it's crucial we don't leave our security to chance. While some argue for international cooperation, history shows that true safety comes from self-reliance. Our allies have their own priorities - we can't count on them to always have our back. Investing in our own defenses isn't just about strength, it's about responsible protection for our generation. #NationalSecurity #SeniorsFirst
